# programs.sesh

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.sesh`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| ------------------------------------- | -------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `programs.sesh.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the sesh terminal session manager. |
| `programs.sesh.enableAlias` | `boolean` | Whether to enable a shell alias s to quickly launch sessions. |
| `programs.sesh.enableTmuxIntegration` | `boolean` | Enable Tmux integration with sesh. |
| `programs.sesh.fzfPackage` | `null or package` | The fzf package to use. |
| `programs.sesh.icons` | `boolean` | Display icons next to results ( --icons argument). |
| `programs.sesh.package` | `package` | The sesh package to use. |
| `programs.sesh.settings` | `open submodule of (TOML value)` | Configuration for sesh, written to ~/.config/sesh/sesh.toml . |
| `programs.sesh.tmuxKey` | `string` | Keybinding for invoking sesh in Tmux. |
| `programs.sesh.zoxidePackage` | `null or package` | The zoxide package to use. |
